benefits.description: weight loss; significant enough to prefer side effects over being 100lbs heavier

side_effects.description: dry skin patches that recur despite treatment with castor oil

protocol_notes: Used Tirzepatide directly from Lily before losing coverage. Experienced similar skin issues to OP. Injection site reactions improved with pre- and post-injection alcohol cleaning and changing injection location. Uses castor oil for dry spots with temporary relief. User has not tried Retatrutide.
